name: compliance source contract plugin-internal validator confirms the additional internal fields are present
command:
mkdir -p compliance/sources && printf 'sources:
  - {id: x, name: x, url: x, authoritative_publisher: x, jurisdiction: x, applicable_to: [x], identifier_scheme: x, fetch_frequency: weekly, legal_review_required: false, paywalled: false, why_authoritative: "a
b
c", fetcher: x, identifier_pattern: x, edition: 2.0, edition_date: 2024-01-01, authority_tier: 1, fragility_tier: medium, origin: default, added_by: plugin, added_at: 2026-05-13T00:00:00Z, license_handling: public-domain}
' > compliance/sources/internal.yaml && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/compliance/validate-source-contract.sh" --registry compliance/sources/internal.yaml --tier plugin 2>out.txt && grep -q 'valid=true' out.txt && grep -q 'plugin_internal_fields_present=true' out.txt && echo ok 1>&2
